scripts.build:local: bun run build-ts && bun run build-pug:local && bun run build-res && bun run build-tailwind
scripts.build:deployment: bun run build-ts && bun run build-pug:deployment && bun run build-res && bun run build-tailwind
scripts.dev: bun run build:local && bun run start
scripts.deploy: bun run clean && bun run build:deployment && gh-pages -d dist --nojekyll -m "$MESSAGE"
